import re, unicodedata

def strip_tashkeel(s):
    # remove Arabic diacritics and tatweel
    diacritics = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x600,0x6FF) if unicodedata.category(chr(c)) in ['Mn'])
    # But better explicit range of combining marks
    # We'll remove all characters with category 'Mn' (nonspacing marks)
    return ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn' and ch != '\u0640')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.strip()
    s = strip_tashkeel(s)
    # unify hamza forms to bare alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ى','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/spaces
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # lowercase doesn't apply to Arabic
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig_full = "مَا كَانَ لِفُؤَادٍ أَنْ يَأْمَنَ مَا تُبْدِي لَهُ السَامِعُونَ"
snippet = "مَا كَانَ ...سَامِعُونَ"

print(normalize_ar(orig_full))

norm_query = normalize_ar(orig_full)
# Search quran for substring matches
matches=[]
for i,rec in enumerate(quran):
    ay = rec['ayah_text']
    nay = normalize_ar(ay)
    if norm_query in nay:
        matches.append((i,rec))
len(matches)

# Search for presence of 'لفؤاد' or 'لفواد' or 'فؤاد' or 'السامعون'
terms = ['لفؤاد','لفواد','فؤاد','السامعون','سامعون','تبدي','السميعون']
for t in terms:
    nt = normalize_ar(t)
    hits=[]
    for rec in quran:
        nay = normalize_ar(rec['ayah_text'])
        if nt and nt in nay:
            hits.append(rec)
    print(t, len(hits))
    # show some examples
    for r in hits[:5]:
        print(r['surah_name'], r['ayah_id'], r['ayah_text'])
    print('---')

def find_in_hadith(term):
    nt=normalize_ar(term)
    ids=[]
    for rec in hadith:
        text = rec.get('hadithTxt') or ''
        text2 = rec.get('Matn') or ''
        if nt in normalize_ar(text) or nt in normalize_ar(text2):
            ids.append(rec)
    return ids

for t in ['ما كان لفؤاد', 'لفؤاد', 'السامعون', 'سماعون', 'ما تبدي', 'تبدي له']:
    hits=find_in_hadith(t)
    print(t, len(hits))
    for r in hits[:3]:
        print(r['title'])
        sample=(r.get('Matn') or r.get('hadithTxt',''))[:160]
        print(sample)
    print('---')
